a: Astarter is a key DeFi infrastructure hub on Cardano, focused on providing a comprehensive ecosystem including an IDO Launchpad, DEX (Astarter Swap), and Money Market. It aims to boost the Cardano ecosystem by supporting high-quality projects and providing liquidity solutions.

q: Where can I find the official links for Astarter?
a: You can find all official links on our Linktree: https://linktr.ee/Astarter. Key links include our Website (https://astarter.io), Documentation (https://docs.astarter.io), and Twitter (@AstarterDefiHub).

q: How can I join the Astarter community?
a: You can join our community on Telegram (https://t.me/astarter_chat), Discord (https://discord.gg/astarter), and follow us on Twitter for the latest updates.

The Astarter Launchpad is a premier IDO platform on Cardano that allows innovative projects to raise capital in a fair and decentralized manner, while giving community members early access to high-potential tokens.

q: Where can I read the project documentation?
a: Our comprehensive technical and project documentation is available at https://docs.astarter.io.
Yes, Astarter has its own ecosystem token. You can find details about the token utility and tokenomics in our docs: https://docs.astarter.io/astarter-tokenomics.

q: Where can I find the source code?
a: Astarter's open-source repositories can be found on GitHub: https://github.com/astarter.
